parameters.functionCode:
const input = $items("Set Input Defaults")[0].json;
const rulesText = (input.rules_text || '')
  .replace(/[ \t]+/g, ' ')
  .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
  .trim();
if (!rulesText) {
  throw new Error('rules_text is required');
}
const fewShot = [
  'Example input: "Maximum height of each building must be at most 75 m."',
  'Example output:',
  '// OntoGraph terms',
  "MERGE (C_Building:Class {iri:'ex:Building'}) SET C_Building.label='Building'",
  "MERGE (DP_H:DatatypeProperty {iri:'ex:hasHeightM'}) SET DP_H.label='hasHeightM', DP_H.range='xsd:decimal'",
  "MERGE (B_gt:Builtin {iri:'swrlb:greaterThan'}) SET B_gt.label='greaterThan'",
  "MERGE (DP_V:DatatypeProperty {iri:'ex:violatesMaxHeight'}) SET DP_V.label='violatesMaxHeight', DP_V.range='xsd:boolean'",
  '// MetaGraph rule + atoms',
  "MERGE (r:Rule {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V'}) SET r.text='Building(?b)^hasHeightM(?b,?h)^swrlb:greaterThan(?h,75)->violatesMaxHeight(?b,true)', r.kind='violation'",
  "MERGE (vb:Var {name:'?b'})",
  "MERGE (vh:Var {name:'?h'})",
  "MERGE (lit75:Literal {lex:'75', datatype:'xsd:decimal'})",
  "MERGE (litT:Literal {lex:'true', datatype:'xsd:boolean'})",
  "MERGE (a1:Atom {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_A1', type:'ClassAtom'})",
  "MERGE (a2:Atom {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_A2', type:'DataPropertyAtom'})",
  "MERGE (a3:Atom {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_A3', type:'BuiltinAtom'})",
  "MERGE (h1:Atom {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_H1', type:'DataPropertyAtom'})",
  'MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:1}]->(a1)',
  'MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:2}]->(a2)',
  'MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:3}]->(a3)',
  'MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {order:1}]->(h1)',
  'MERGE (a1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(C_Building)',
  'MERGE (a2)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_H)',
  'MERGE (a3)-[:REFERS_TO]->(B_gt)',
  'MERGE (h1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_V)',
  'MERGE (a1)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(vb)',
  'MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(vb)',
  'MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {pos:2}]->(vh)',
  'MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(vh)',
  'MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {pos:2}]->(lit75)',
  'MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(vb)',
  'MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {pos:2}]->(litT)'
].join('\n');
const prompt = [
  'Convert design rules into Neo4j Cypher MERGE statements. Output Cypher only, no JSON, no markdown fences.',
  'Follow these conventions exactly:',
  '- Ontology nodes: Class (iri, label), DatatypeProperty (iri, label, range), ObjectProperty (iri, label, range), Builtin (iri, label).',
  '- Rule node: Rule (id, text = full SWRL expression, kind = violation).',
  '- Atom nodes: Atom (id = ruleId + suffix, type = ClassAtom|DataPropertyAtom|ObjectPropertyAtom|BuiltinAtom).',
  '- Variable nodes: Var (name = ?x).',
  '- Literal nodes: Literal (lex = value string, datatype = xsd:decimal|xsd:integer|xsd:boolean).',
  '- Relationships: HAS_BODY {order:N}, HAS_HEAD {order:N}, REFERS_TO, ARG {pos:N}.',
  '- Rule id format: R_DOMAIN_PROPERTY_LIMIT_V (e.g. R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V).',
  '- Use domain-specific property names with units (e.g. hasHeightM, hasClearWidthM, hasAreaM2).',
  '- Use violation pattern: body checks condition that breaks the rule, head sets violates flag to true.',
  '- For "at most X" use swrlb:greaterThan in body. For "at least X" use swrlb:lessThan in body.',
  '- IRI prefix: ex: for domain terms, swrlb: for builtins.',
  '',
  fewShot,
  '',
  'Now convert this rule:',
  rulesText
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...input, prompt } }];

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ { "model": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.ollama_model, "prompt": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.prompt, "stream": false, "keep_alive": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.ollama_keep_alive } }}
